clusters.justification: This cluster captures the broad macroscopic axis of emotional reactivity, mood, and valence processing typically subserved by amygdalo-cortical and anterior insular circuitry.
These terms represent the high-level functional domain of reward processing, incentive salience, and cost-benefit outcome calculation anchored within frontostriatal and dopaminergic pathways.

This cluster reflects the internally directed, self-referential, and interpersonal representational processes that map mapping onto the midline cortical regions responsible for modeling the self and the minds of others.
